title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE SITIO OF BAMBANAN MUNICIPALITY OF TAYTAY, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN, INTO A BARRIO OF SAID MUNICIPALITY.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4680 / 52 OG No. 9, 4206 (August 16, 1956)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1525, June 16, 1956 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING THE SITIO OF BAMBANAN MUNICIPALITY OF TAYTAY, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN, INTO A BARRIO OF SAID MUNICIPALITY.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Bambanan, Municipality of Taytay, Province of Palawan, is converted into a barrio of said municipality to be known as the barrio of Bambanan.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 16, 1956.
